details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Environmentally Friendly, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Waterproof

about_item: Orthopedic Support: Give your pet the gift of true comfort with this thick, orthopedic dog bed. Featuring a plush cover, sturdy shredded foam, and an extra-padded base—twice as thick as competitors. It offers superior support for arthritis by relieving pressure in joints and spines, especially in large or aging dogs. Every nap becomes a luxurious, ache-soothing escape.

Ultra-Comfortable Headrest: This dog bed is thoughtfully crafted with three supportive bolsters, providing pressure-relief for their heads and necks. The lowered front entry ensures effortless access for pets of all ages and sizes, easing joint strain and making every climb in and out a breeze.

Superior Softness: The plush sherpa material provides warmth and comfort, perfect for snuggling up and snoozing down. This dog bed's understated design, that can accomodate pets of all sizes, is a perfect complement for any modern room decor.

Waterproof & Easy Care: The waterproof cover protects the foam from spills, accidents, and moisture. The cover features two hidden zippers at the side and base, making it fully removable and machine-washable.
Pet Safe Materials: Made with soft sherpa fleece, this OEKO-TEX(24.HCN.46956) certified pet bed offers a comfy, secure spot with a non-slip bottom for added stability.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, comfortable, and supportive, with plenty of cushioning and firm orthopedic design. The bed is thick and durable, holding its shape well, and customers consider it good value for money. Regarding size, while some find the large size perfect, others report it being much smaller than described.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Great bed, good quality and was exactly as advertised. I bought a L plus for my 27kg Vizsla, should have bought the next size, but he still fits.
A great dog bed that is good quality and elevated support as described. Our senior GSD immediately loved it, hoping it maintains its support....
Love it! Great quality, firm. My dog weighs 65lbs and it does not sink in at all. Which so important bc he’s has two knee surgeries....
...He goes and lays on it with the crate open to sleep. It’s nice and soft. The 3 chambers are helpful in keeping it from developing a middle sag spot....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, particularly noting that their pets sleep well in their own space, and one customer mentions it provides pain relief.

examples.snippet: ...The bed itself is comfortable, it’s easy to remove the cover to wash it, and the stuffing is in individual rolls and so it doesn’t make a mess when...
...being a new thing in his house and he was on it once and looked very comfortable. It's a good size for our Aussie.
...He prefers his bed to mine. Finally I get my own bed. It looks good and comfy.
...I can tell he has comfort and support from the floor. It has lasted better than most beds. Vacuums well. I will purchased again!

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and comfortable, describing it as super cushioned and firm orthopedic style with plenty of padding. One customer mentions it provides enough support for a 70-pound pup.

examples.snippet: ...He goes and lays on it with the crate open to sleep. It’s nice and soft. The 3 chambers are helpful in keeping it from developing a middle sag spot....
...The bed is very thick and firm, looks nice. I did a decent amount of looking at various beds before settling on the Bedsure bed and I’m glad I did....
My dog loves it. Super soft for an old guy with hip dysplasia. He was a stray dog, ive had him for 11years and he needed a softer bed b
Plush! My dog immediately took to it and it is supportive. Definitely for a medium size dog. Order XXL if you have a large breed.

insights.title: Thickness
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the bed's thickness, describing it as well-made and cushioned, with one customer noting it provides good support for senior dogs.

examples.snippet: This bed by far is amazing !! It’s nice and thick as described not like the 10others I’ve tried lol that when you get them the pup actually sinks to...
...The bed is very thick and firm, looks nice. I did a decent amount of looking at various beds before settling on the Bedsure bed and I’m glad I did....
...Wow! This thing is super thick, super soft and she loves it. The cover comes off to wash it and the color was super nice too....
Highly recommend! These beds are so thick and my dogs are all loving their new beds....

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed durable, noting that it holds its shape well and lasts a long time.

examples.snippet: My dogs absolutely love these beds. The are durable, soft and price was not bad. Haven't had to wash them yet but I will keep you posted.
I am very pleased with the appearance, quality, and durability of this dog bed....
...It grew, and grew, and grew yet maintained its shape and has no weird smells!...
...Also, my dog scratched a hole in it. Now I have to find something else. Wasn't worth it.

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be a good value for money, describing it as a best investment with good quality relative to its price.

examples.snippet: Dogs love it! Good quality for a great price. I got XL so my dogs can share. Big enough for 2 medium-size dogs.
...A really solid price and amazing comfort. I think it’s really worth the price for all of them. The $50 one is a bit small for my big guy....
Finally! A great value and loads of support. Easy to wash as well.
Soft and comfy! Great Buy

examples.snippet: ...have sat on the bed to play with a puppy and it puffs back up and is supportive really happy with this purchase and currently my puppy is too.
My dog and I love this bed. It’s very supportive and doesn’t go flat at all when my dog lays in it. It’s more like a couch for your dog....

I have a picky dog when it comes to beds. She LOVES this one! Super supportive with the ortho memory foam, just enough bolster on the sides and back....

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the size of the dog bed, with some finding the large size perfect and spacious, while others report that it is much smaller than described and not suitable for larger dogs like Golden Retrievers.

examples.snippet: Good size, structure, cushiness, comfortable, sturdy. Washable cover.
Nice bed but it waś too small. Said length was 42" but the surface area wasn't that big maybe measured on diagonal?...
Very comfy and big!
My dog loves it perfect size holdings up well with my 120 lb dog..have not washed it yet I would recommend

authors_reviews.title: This bed is amazing!
authors_reviews.text: I was in need of a new bed for my 7 year old large (90 pound) mixed breed. She's been moving a little slower than usual, and I wanted a bed that gave her better support. I searched the web for articles rating dog beds, and this was ranked #1. The price was definitely right, but I was a little nervous given the bed ranked #2 was close to $200.I am so glad I ordered this bed. It came in a shockingly small box (12 x 12 x 18 ish). There is no assembly needed. Once you open the double vacuum sealed bags, the bed starts puffing up immediately. Within 24 hours, it's fully fluffed. It is firm, but has give with the chunks of orthopedic foam interior. I love that when it needs to be washed, it has sewn sections and small fill "pillows" to fit the support material in.We are test driving this one for a little longer, but I see another one or two in my !mazon cart soon
authors_reviews.author: Lynn Strong

authors_reviews.title: My dog loved this so much I ordered another!
authors_reviews.text: I ordered this bed to replace my 13-year-old Duck Toller’s bed which no longer provided enough support. Most other beds are either flat or the rolled sides are too high and just reduce the amount of sleeping area. If you’ve ever seen how a Toller sleeps, you know they like to splay out sometimes. This bed has angled sides that she uses as a pillow. It’s very thick and well-made and offers plenty of support. She loved it and sleeps so comfortably on it that I decided to order a second bed for another room. (She’s a little spoiled.)She’s about 35 pounds and the large size was perfect.I highly recommend this bed.
authors_reviews.author: DM

authors_reviews.title: Chunky, supportive, well-made, and high approval rating from my dog.
authors_reviews.text: Great dog bed, my dog instantly loved it, and its clearly the highest value place to sleep, over the sofa and the human bed! It takes a couple of days to fully expand and fluff out, and its a very chunky, supportive, dense, but soft bed. I like the way the cushions are inserted into the cover, by separating them into pockets, it should hold it's shape over time. My mistake was not really measuring properly, the "sleeping area" is smaller than I realized, and I should have sized up. But thats my fault, not the manufacturers. Great bed, I would buy it again.
authors_reviews.author: Jo Wright

authors_reviews.title: HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS DOG BED!!
authors_reviews.text: My son’s dog loved this bed the first time he used it last month. I have a couch dog bed purchased previously from a TV show that he loved too. Once this floor bed came he wouldn’t sleep on the couch bed. He preferred the floor bed even though both were in place for him to choose. Washing the cover is very easy. However the material on the inside for the center dividers should be reinforced a lot better. I had to repair one that I saw was loose at the top when I took out the foam inserts before washing the cover. It would’ve ripped when trying to reinsert the foam inserts. It was a bit challenging to get the outside foam inserted and zipped up. I ended up placing it on a bed to get it zipped up. I think I used some of my daily exercising minutes up just getting this done. 🤣Otherwise it is VERY WELL made and really holds its shape. I will be dog sitting again soon and can’t wait for him to use it again. He is a mid size dog and it has plenty of space on it for him to sleep. I find that he loves the cushions on the sides of both types of beds for resting his back, neck, and head and offers a good support.GREAT PRODUCT!!
authors_reviews.author: Fay

authors_reviews.title: Nice bed but...
authors_reviews.text: Nice thick bed. I wish the bolsters were larger and more prominent for giant breed (great Dane). Danes have a longer neck and bolsters make it much more comfortable
authors_reviews.author: BarneyFyfe

authors_reviews.title: Very good quality bed and very supportive
authors_reviews.text: Update: washed this bed for the first time today. It was pretty easy to get apart and not as hard as I expected it to be to get the 3 chambers back together. It still looks great after the first wash. Added new pictures showing the chambers and the bed after it was washed. They are the pictures where he is not laying on the bed.My baby loves this bed. He goes and lays on it with the crate open to sleep. It’s nice and soft. The 3 chambers are helpful in keeping it from developing a middle sag spot. It’s a little on the heavier side due to the materials inside but that is of little issue. It’s made of good material and ids the perfect size for him.
authors_reviews.author: Cindy McCauley

authors_reviews.title: Best Dog Bed!!
authors_reviews.text: Best dog bed I have ever purchased and I have purchased many over the years.The stuffing is firm but soft. It holds my 90 lbs husky very well and does not collapse under his weight. I can tell he has comfort and support from the floor.It has lasted better than most beds. Vacuums well.I will purchased again!
authors_reviews.author: SteelPetalTKD

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: I was very very impressed with the quality of this bed!! I am not a big review writer, but I so glad that I pulled the trigger and purchased the bed. My pup is a senior girl and based on other reviews that claimed their senior dog was much more comfortable …. I went for it. She loves it!! and the side walls are not too high or low. It doesn’t decompress to the floor when she lays on it. It’s really nice and firm without being too hard. Quality is truly outstanding and I wished I had know about it sooner. I highly recommend this bed! My girl digs before she lays down, so I have a thick blanket on it so she doesn’t dig into the fabric. For reference my dog is 52lbs and is a shepherd mix. Overtime she could rip the fabric but with a blanket over it, she won’t get close enough. We purchased the XL PRO. And it’s the perfect width and length for her. She is able to stretch out comfortably. Buy it. You won’t have any regrets.
authors_reviews.author: Jennifer

other_countries_reviews.title: Great bed
other_countries_reviews.text: Very happy with this bed. It is thick, firm, and offers excellent support. Very easy to take the cushions out to wash the cover. XL Plus for a golden retriever.
other_countries_reviews.author: Patrick Johnston

other_countries_reviews.title: Excellent dog bed
other_countries_reviews.text: As advertised; accurate sizing, expands and firms up at edges to create resting spot for dog’s head. Seems durable with comfy material for sleeping.
other_countries_reviews.author: A Wilson

other_countries_reviews.title: Ruby loves her new bed❤️
other_countries_reviews.text: Our dog Ruby loves her new bed!!She loves that that she does not want to get out of it. She stretches out. It’s nice and big. She’s a big girl 130 pounds and she has lots of room to stretch out a full length, not hanging over the bed. We’re so happy with that purchase. I recommend it to any and all pet owners.❤️
other_countries_reviews.author: Elie

other_countries_reviews.title: Firm bed with subtle bolsters
other_countries_reviews.text: I really like how thick and firm this bed is, but the bolsters are not very pronounced. For the medium size, the space between the side bolsters is 20.5 inches, and the space from the back bolster to the front edge is 17 inches. That is the space available if the dog wants to lie in the bed with head resting on a bolster.The size medium is tight for my standard size Australian Shepherd. It works because it is for a spot where she likes to curl up. It would be too small as a primary bed because she can’t spread out.
other_countries_reviews.author: K.C
